_meta.title: Video Extend + Edit Pipeline (Veo 3.1 + Kling O3)
_meta.description: 5-stage pipeline: T2I → I2V → Video Extend → Video Edit → Output. Uses Veo 3.1 Fast for I2V/Extend and Kling O3 for Edit with auto-upscale.
_meta.author: ComfyUI Learning PostGrad#15

inputs.text: A majestic red lobster samurai standing in a moonlit bamboo forest, wearing ornate silver armor with cherry blossom engravings, holding a katana, dramatic volumetric lighting, cinematic composition, 8K ultra-detailed

2._comment: Stage 1: Encode prompt for keyframe generation

3._comment: Load Flux model for keyframe T2I

inputs.prompt: The lobster samurai slowly draws the katana, moonlight gleams off the blade, bamboo leaves fall gently, dramatic cinematic motion

10._comment: Stage 2: Veo 3.1 I2V - generates 8s video with audio

inputs.text:
=== VIDEO EXTEND STAGE ===
Veo 3.1 Video Extend is NOT yet available as a Partner Node.
This would need a custom API node or RunningHub integration.

API endpoint: rhart-video-v3.1-fast-official/video-extend
Params: video (VIDEO), prompt (STRING), resolution (720p/1080p)
Adds ~7s to input video. Cost: ¥0.95 (fast) / ¥2.52 (pro)

--- Pseudo-node below for pipeline planning ---

21._comment: Stage 3 output: Save extended video (placeholder - in production this would be the extend output)

inputs.text:
=== VIDEO EDIT STAGE ===
Kling O3 Pro Video Edit: Edits scene + auto-upscales 720p→1080p
Kling O3 Std Video Edit: Edits scene, maintains resolution

API params:
  - prompt: edit instruction (max 5000 chars)
  - videoUrl: source video (max 50MB)
  - imageUrls: up to 4 reference images (optional)
  - keepOriginalSound: boolean

O3 Pro: ¥1.20, 175s, auto-upscale to 1080p
O3 Std: ¥0.88, 300s, maintains resolution

Key finding: O3 Pro = Edit + Upscale in one step!

=== PRODUCTION PIPELINE COST BREAKDOWN ===

Minimal Pipeline (15s/720p):
  T2I:        ¥0.03 (30s)
  I2V 8s:     ¥0.04 (130s) 
  Extend +7s: ¥0.95 (115s)
  Total:      ¥1.02 / ~5min

Premium Pipeline (15s/1080p edited):
  T2I:        ¥0.03 (30s)
  I2V 8s:     ¥0.04 (130s)
  Extend +7s: ¥0.95 (115s)
  Edit+Upscale:¥1.20 (175s)
  Total:      ¥2.22 / ~8min
